internal_thoughts:
*   Elliot: Claims Troublemaker.
    *   Ashley: Claims Robber.
    *   James: Claims Doppelganger (who copied Robber).
    *   Chris: Claims Hunter (initially), then says he's the Doppelganger (confusedly), then settles on Hunter/Doppelganger confusion. Wait, let's re-read.
    *   Sukeshi: Claims Seer.
    *   Sian: No claim, "no comment", "sleeping soundly".

    *   Ashley: "Because I was the robber." (Line 24)
    *   Elliot: "I was the troublemaker." (Line 28)
    *   Chris: "I was the hunter." (Line 36)
    *   James: "I was somebody that took your card." (Line 39) -> "I was the doppelganger" (Line 69) -> "I robbed you last time" (Line 87 - referring to previous game? No, wait).
    *   Sukeshi: "I was the seer, and I saw that he [Elliot] was the troublemaker." (Line 77)

    *   James claims he was the Doppelganger and copied the Robber (Ashley).
    *   Ashley claims she was the Robber.
    *   Elliot claims he was the Troublemaker.
    *   Sukeshi claims she was the Seer and saw Elliot was the Troublemaker.
    *   Chris claims he was the Hunter.

    *   If James is the Doppelganger and copied Ashley (Robber), he would have performed the Robber's action.
    *   If Elliot is the Troublemaker, he swapped two people.
    *   If Sukeshi is the Seer, she confirmed Elliot.
    *   If Chris is the Hunter, he's village.

    *   Sian has made no claim and has been silent.
    *   The group concludes that since everyone else has a role claim that seems to fit together (Seer, Troublemaker, Robber, Doppelganger, Hunter), Sian is the most likely Werewolf or Tanner.
    *   Sian's silence ("No comment") is viewed as suspicious.

    *   Sian is the only player without a role claim.
    *   The other five players have claims that are mutually supportive (Sukeshi confirms Elliot; James's Doppelganger claim fits with Ashley's Robber claim).
    *   Even if some are lying, Sian is the most obvious target for Team Village.

    *   Wait, James says "I was somebody that took your card" to Chris (Line 39).
    *   Chris says "I was the hunter" (Line 36).
    *   James says "I know you were the hunter, because... I was somebody that took your card" (Line 37-39).
    *   Then James says he was the Doppelganger (Line 69).
    *   If James (Doppelganger) copied Ashley (Robber), he would rob someone. If he robbed Chris (Hunter), he would know Chris was the Hunter.
    *   This logic holds up.

    *   Sian is the only one without a claim.
    *   The others have a cohesive story.
    *   Voting for Sian is the most logical move for Team Village.

parsed_output.justification: Sian is the only player who did not provide a role claim and remained silent throughout most of the discussion. The other five players provided mutually supporting claims: Sukeshi (Seer) confirmed Elliot (Troublemaker), and James (Doppelganger) claimed to have copied Ashley (Robber) and robbed Chris (Hunter), which explains how he knew Chris's role. Given that the other players' stories align, Sian is the most likely candidate to be a Werewolf or the Tanner.

Given that the other players' stories align, Sian is the most likely candidate to be a Werewolf or the Tanner.
